rulings.Case Title: JOHN MARC PEREZ VS. RICARDO LUCHA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION And Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 1. DEFENDANT RICARDO LUCHA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. DENIED. Motion for summary adjudication shall not be granted if it does not completely dispose of a cause of action, an affirmative defense, a claim for damages, or an issue of duty. See CCP 437c(f)(1). The fourth cause of action is based, inter alia, on violation of SFRO 37.10B; separate statement includes no material facts pertaining to punitive damages or attorney's fees (which are available under SFRO 37.10B). Additionally, moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: HERBERT GLENN BEASLEY VS. SEAN W. YORE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To Ccp Section 128.7
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 2. PLAINTIFF HERBERT BEASLEY'S Motion For Sanctions Pursuant To CCP Section 128.7. Granted per CCP 128.7(b)(2). Sanctions granted against Defendant's counsel of record and his law firm as indicated on counsel's bar listing. Defendant's untimely opposition considered. Sanctions granted in the amount of $8,516.25 to be paid within 15 days of notice of entry of order. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES D. BANKS VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 3. DEFENDANT COURTHOUSE VENTURES INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to May 9, 2018 to be heard with other pending motion. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion & Motion For Order Restoring Case On Civil Active Status And Trial Calendar, And To Set Aside Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 4. PLAINTIFF VLAD CHERNOGUS' Amended Motion For Order Restoring Case On Civil Active Status And Trial Calendar, And To Set Aside Settlement Agreement. DENIED. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: GUNTREN LOFTS PARTNERSHIP VS. JONATHAN E LEPPERT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Dismissal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 5. PLAINTIFF GUNTRE LOFTS PARTNERSHIP'S Motion To Set Aside Dismissal. GRANTED. Dismissal is set aside per CCP 473(b). No opposition filed. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Case Title: XIAOFEI LI VS. VERONICA PINEDA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 6. DEFENDANTS VERONICA PINEDA, PAUL SALAS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustained without leave to amend. Notice is fatally defective. Notice must demand the precise sum owed. Notice demands rent twice for 9/15/2017. Complaint in unlawful detainer actions is stickily construed. =(501/SRB)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, April 20, 2018, Line 7. PLAINTIFF WCP II, LLC'S Motion For Summary Judgment. GRANTED, subject to opposition. =(501/SRB)
